t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: No valid upstream wiki for etoro.Dictionary.AccountType exists on disk. Bundle provided USABroker.Dictionary.AccountType (Apex Clearing: AccuntTypeID, 3 rows: CASH/MARGIN/OPTION) which is the wrong table entirely.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Primary key identifying the account classification. 0=N/A (DWH sentinel), 1=Private, 2=Corporate, 3=IB Account, 4=Joint, 5=White Label, 6=Affiliate Private, 7=Employee, 8=Custodian, 9=Fund, 10=eToro Group, 11=News, 12=White List, 13=Analyst, 14=SMSF, 15=Affiliate Corporate, 16=Administrated, 17=Funded Employee, 18=Trust. Controls feature access, regulatory treatment, fee structures, and compliance monitoring level. (Tier 1 — Dictionary.AccountType)
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Entire description is original composition, not inherited. No etoro.Dictionary.AccountType wiki exists to quote from. Should be Tier 3.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Re-run with: (1) Generate the etoro.Dictionary.AccountType upstream wiki FIRST, then re-run this wiki to properly inherit Tier 1 descriptions verbatim. (2) Until that wiki exists, re-tag AccountTypeID and Name as Tier 3 (no upstream wiki available) — do NOT claim Tier 1 without a quotable source.
